# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

```yaml
name: Release and Publish

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*.*.*'

permissions:
  contents: write
  packages: write

jobs:
  validate:
    name: Validate Tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}
      is_prerelease: ${{ steps.check_prerelease.outputs.is_prerelease }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Get version from tag
        id: get_version
        run: |
          VERSION=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Version: $VERSION"

      - name: Check if prerelease
        id: check_prerelease
        run: |
          VERSION=${{ steps.get_version.outputs.version }}
          if [[ "$VERSION" =~ (alpha|beta|rc) ]]; then
            echo "is_prerelease=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "is_prerelease=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi

  build-node:
    name: Build Node.js Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate
    if: hashFiles('package.json') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build package
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-dist
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            lib/
          retention-days: 1

  build-python:
    name: Build Python Package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate
    if: hashFiles('setup.py', 'pyproject.toml') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
          cache: 'pip'

      - name: Install build dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build wheel twine

      - name: Install package dependencies
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f setup.py ]; then pip install -e .; fi

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi
          python -m pytest --if-present || echo "No tests found"

      - name: Build package
        run: python -m build

      - name: Check package
        run: twine check dist/*

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  build-binaries:
    name: Build Binaries
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            platform: linux
            arch: x64
          - os: macos-latest
            platform: darwin
            arch: x64
          - os: windows-latest
            platform: windows
            arch: x64
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    needs: validate
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build binary
        run: npm run build:binary --if-present

      - name: Package binary
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p release
          if [ "${{ matrix.platform }}" = "windows" ]; then
            if [ -f "dist/app.exe" ]; then
              cp dist/app.exe release/app-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}.exe
            fi
          else
            if [ -f "dist/app" ]; then
              cp dist/app release/app-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}
              chmod +x release/app-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}
            fi
          fi

      - name: Upload binary artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binary-${{ matrix.platform }}-${{ matrix.arch }}
          path: release/
          retention-days: 1

  generate-changelog:
    name: Generate Changelog
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate
    outputs:
      changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate changelog
        id: changelog
        run: |
          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-version:refname | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | head -n 2 | tail -n 1)
          CURRENT_TAG=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}
          
          if [ -z "$PREVIOUS_TAG" ]; then
            PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git rev-list --max-parents=0 HEAD)
          fi
          
          echo "Generating changelog from $PREVIOUS_TAG to $CURRENT_TAG"
          
          CHANGELOG=$(git log $PREVIOUS_TAG..$CURRENT_TAG --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" --no-merges)
          
          if [ -z "$CHANGELOG" ]; then
            CHANGELOG="- Initial release"
          fi
          
          echo "changelog<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$CHANGELOG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Create changelog file
        run: |
          cat << EOF > RELEASE_NOTES.md
          ## What's Changed
          
          ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
          
          **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/compare/$PREVIOUS_TAG...${{ github.ref_name }}
          EOF

      - name: Upload changelog
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: changelog
          path: RELEASE_NOTES.md
          retention-days: 1

  create-release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, build-node, build-python, build-binaries, generate-changelog]
    if: always() && needs.validate.result == 'success'
    outputs:
      upload_url: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download all artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: artifacts/

      - name: Download changelog
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: changelog
          path: .

      - name: Create Release
        id: create_release
        uses: actions/create-release@v1
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          release_name: Release ${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
          body_path: RELEASE_NOTES.md
          draft: false
          prerelease: ${{ needs.validate.outputs.is_prerelease }}

      - name: Upload binary assets
        shell: bash
        run: |
          for file in artifacts/binary-*/*; do
            if [ -f "$file" ]; then
              filename=$(basename "$file")
              echo "Uploading $filename"
              curl -X POST \
                -H "Authorization: token ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" \
                -H "Content-Type: application/octet-stream" \
                --data-binary @"$file" \
                "${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}?name=$filename"
            fi
          done

  publish-npm:
    name: Publish to npm
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, build-node, create-release]
    if: needs.build-node.result == 'success'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-dist
          path: .

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Verify version matches tag
        run: |
          PACKAGE_VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
          TAG_VERSION=${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
          if [ "$PACKAGE_VERSION" != "$TAG_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "Version mismatch: package.json has $PACKAGE_VERSION but tag is $TAG_VERSION"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Publish to npm
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.validate.outputs.is_prerelease }}" = "true" ]; then
            npm publish --tag next
          else
            npm publish
          fi
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}" > .npmrc
          echo "@${{ github.repository_owner }}:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com" >> .npmrc
          npm publish --registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com || echo "GitHub Packages publish failed"
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  publish-pypi:
    name: Publish to PyPI
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, build-python, create-release]
    if: needs.build-python.result == 'success'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-dist
          path: dist/

      - name: Install twine
        run: pip install twine

      - name: Verify version matches tag
        run: |
          if [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
            PACKAGE_VERSION=$(python setup.py --version)
          elif [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            PACKAGE_VERSION=$(python -c "import tomli; print(tomli.load(open('pyproject.toml', 'rb'))['project']['version'])")
          fi
          TAG_VERSION=${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
          if [ "$PACKAGE_VERSION" != "$TAG_VERSION" ]; then
            echo "Version mismatch: package has $PACKAGE_VERSION but tag is $TAG_VERSION"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          twine upload dist/*

      - name: Publish to Test PyPI
        if: needs.validate.outputs.is_prerelease == 'true'
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.TEST_PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          twine upload --repository testpypi dist/* || echo "Test PyPI publish failed"

  publish-docker:
    name: Publish Docker Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, create-release]
    if: hashFiles('Dockerfile') != ''
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Login to Docker Hub
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}

      - name: Login to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: |
            ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}/${{ github.event.repository.name }}
            ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}},value=${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}},value=${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}},value=${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable=${{ needs.validate.outputs.is_prerelease == 'false' }}

      - name: Build and push
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          platforms: linux/amd64,linux/arm64
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

  notify:
    name: Notify Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [validate, create-release, publish-npm, publish-pypi, publish-docker]
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Check job statuses
        run: |
          echo "Validate: ${{ needs.validate.result }}"
          echo "Create Release: ${{ needs.create-release.result }}"
          echo "Publish npm: ${{ needs.publish-npm.result }}"
          echo "Publish PyPI: ${{ needs.publish-pypi.result }}"
          echo "Publish Docker: ${{ needs.publish-docker.result }}"

      - name: Send Slack notification
        if: env.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL != ''
        env:
          SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
        run: |
          STATUS="success"
          if [ "${{ needs.create-release.result }}" != "success" ]; then
            STATUS="failure"
          fi
          
          curl -X POST $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL \
            -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
            -d '{
              "text": "Release ${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }} - '$STATUS'",
              "blocks": [
                {
                  "type": "section",
                  "text": {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Release ${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }}* - '$STATUS'\n<https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tag/${{ github.ref_name }}|View Release>"
                  }
                }
              ]
            }'

      - name: Create issue on failure
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            github.rest.issues.create({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              title: 'Release ${{ needs.validate.outputs.version }} failed',
              body:
